MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANAKA, TOMMY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-01-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. PLTFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, MITCHELL GARY KEARNY, PETE EDWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 735 O'FARREL STREET, #31, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $945.00 RENT, $550.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,495.00, LEASE FORFEITED, RENT AND DAMAGES IN AMOUNT OF $945.00, ATTORNEY'S FEES & COST WAIVE BY PLAINTIFF IF DEFTS VACATE PREMISES BY NOV.15,1994. (SEE JUDGMENT FOR MORE DETAIL)
